theme.strategy: Dual Theme (Light & Dark) with High-Contrast Swiss Typography. Monochromatic base, semantic accents.

guidelines: No generic 'Inter' for headings. Cabinet Grotesk provides a structured, modern SaaS look.
Satoshi for body text ensures crisp readability.
Use JetBrains Mono for all numeric data, currency, dates, and attendance metrics to align vertically.
Heading sizes must not exceed text-4xl on desktop. Example: H1 = text-3xl font-medium tracking-tight.

structure: App Shell: 240px persistent left sidebar navigation. Main content area to the right.
Top Bar: Minimalist breadcrumbs, search shortcut (CMD+K), and Theme Toggle.
Page Content: Constrained max-width (e.g., max-w-7xl) for readability or full-width with generous px-8 padding.
Grid Strategy: Use CSS grid-cols-12. KPI metric strips use col-span-3 (4 items) or col-span-4 (3 items).
cards_and_surfaces: The 'Technical' Look: Grid Borders instead of isolated cards where possible. Exposed skeletons.
Cards: Flat solid background (bg-card), 1px border (border-border), NO box-shadow default. On hover: subtle shadow-sm or slight border darken.
No glassmorphism. Strict separation of background and surface.
Header/Nav: Solid background with hard bottom border. Never use transparent background over scrolling content.

shadcn_customizations.Button: Sharp or slightly rounded (radius 6px). Primary is pure black (light) / pure white (dark). No gradients.
shadcn_customizations.Calendar: Central to the app. Should have Day/Week/Month views. Events rendered as flat colored blocks without borders.
shadcn_customizations.DataTable: Use TanStack table. 1px borders between rows. Hover state on rows. Dense spacing (py-2).
shadcn_customizations.Badge/Tags: Subtle background with solid text (see semantic_status). No pill shapes, use radius 4px.
shadcn_customizations.Input/Forms: bg-transparent, 1px border. Focus state: ring-1 ring-primary. No thick outlines.

specific_pages.name: Tutor Dashboard
specific_pages.layout: Metric Strip (Top row: Today's Classes, Pending Payments, Students Absent). Below: 2-column grid (60% Today's Schedule, 40% Recent Activity / Action Items).

specific_pages.name: Student Management
specific_pages.layout: List view with robust filtering. Detailed slide-out panel (Sheet) for student details to avoid page loads.

specific_pages.name: Calendar
specific_pages.layout: Full viewport height minus header. Sidebar toggles to filter class types (Regular, Extra, Test).

guidelines: Micro-animations on hover: slight background color shift or border color shift.
No bouncy or flashy animations. Use linear or smooth ease-out curves.
Skeleton loaders matching layout exactly (not spinners). Perceived load <100ms.
Active states should feel tactile but flat.

icons_and_assets.style: Use Duotone weight or Regular. Keep stroke width consistent.

guidelines: Contrast ratios strictly enforced. Text must be legible on backgrounds.
Focus states are mandatory: ring-2 ring-ring ring-offset-2 ring-offset-background.
data-testid on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='create-class-button').
Do NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, or any surface that has content under it.

instructions_to_main_agent: Start by setting up Tailwind config with Cabinet Grotesk, Satoshi, and JetBrains Mono.
Implement the Dual Theme approach (Light/Dark) via CSS variables mapped to Tailwind classes.
Build the App Shell (Sidebar + Header) first.
Implement the Dashboard using the KPI metric strip and dense CSS Grids.
For the Calendar, ensure it supports Day/Week/Month views with standard SaaS styling.
Create reusable UI components (Card, Badge, Button, Input) using Shadcn primitives but heavily style them for the 'Flat, Minimal, Technical' SaaS look.
Avoid generic centered layouts, huge gradients, or large rounded corners. Keep it sharp (max radius 6px).
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: IMPORTANT: Use .js and .jsx files exclusively. Do NOT use .tsx or TypeScript, as per CRITICAL RULES.
DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans. Use Cabinet Grotesk & Satoshi.
DO NOT apply global transitions like 'transition: all'.
DO NOT use generic centered layouts. Use grid alignment.
Use 2-3x more spacing (p-6, p-8) around major sections, but dense spacing inside tables.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover and focus states.
Never use placeholder text for logos or images; use text initials or generic icons if avatars aren't available.
